login.title: Login
login.agreementText: An account will be automatically created if not registered. By clicking 'Create Account,' you agree to Voicica's
login.termsPrefix: By continuing, you agree to our
login.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 6 characters
login.loginFailed: Login failed. Please check your email and password.
login.signupFailed: Sign up failed. Please try again.
login.emailAlreadyInUse: This email is already registered. Please log in or use a different email.
login.weakPassword: Password is too weak. Please use a stronger password.
login.userNotFound: User not found. Please sign up first.
login.tooManyRequests: Too many requests. Please try again later.
login.resetPasswordEmailRequired: Please enter your email address first
login.resetPasswordFailed: Failed to send reset email. Please try again
login.resetEmailSent: Password reset email sent! Please check your inbox
login.checkInboxToVerify: Please check your inbox and click the verification link to activate your account.
login.emailNotVerified: Please verify your email first. A new verification email has been sent to your inbox.
